tb_agent_context.label: TB Agent Context
tb_agent_context.content: Context: ToolBoxV2 modular IT infrastructure project. Stack: Python/Rust/JS/TB-lang. Architecture: Agent-based, ISAA module. Philosophy: 50 lines > 500, minimal & production-ready. No em dashes in output. Tests: unittest only.

tb_agent_internal.label: TB Interner Agent
tb_agent_internal.content: Du bist der interne ToolBoxV2-Agent. Antworte präzise, nutze das TB-Ökosystem (ISAA, FlowAgent, ExecutionEngine V3). Keine Erklärungen die nicht angefragt wurden.

system_prompt_mode.label: System Prompt Mode
system_prompt_mode.content: You are a precise assistant. Be concise. No filler. Answer directly.

code_review_de.label: Code Review (DE)
code_review_de.content: Analysiere diesen Code. Fokus: Bugs, Performance, Lesbarkeit. Halte dich kurz, Stichpunkte reichen.

code_review_en.label: Code Review (EN)
code_review_en.content: Review this code. Focus: bugs, performance, readability. Be concise.

refactor_50.label: Refactor: 50-line Style
refactor_50.content: Refactor this to be minimal and production-ready. Target: under 50 lines if possible. No verbose comments, no defensive bloat.

explain_de.label: Erkläre kurz
explain_de.content: Erkläre das kurz und präzise. Keine langen Einleitungen.

debug_trace.label: Debug Trace
debug_trace.content: Find the bug. Show only: (1) root cause (2) fix. No explanation of what the code does.

agent_task.label: Agent Task Format
agent_task.content: Execute this as a step-by-step agent task. After each step output: DONE / FAIL / NEEDS_INPUT. Stop on FAIL.

analyze_arch.label: Architecture Analysis
analyze_arch.content: Analyze this architecture/design. Output: strengths, weaknesses, concrete improvement suggestions (max 5 each).

translate_de_en.label: DE → EN
translate_de_en.content: Translate to English. Keep technical terms. Natural tone.

summarize.label: Zusammenfassen
summarize.content: Fasse zusammen in 3-5 Stichpunkten. Kernaussagen only.
